title: Modern Beta
description: A datapack thats aims to recreating the charm of mc beta
body:
**A datapack that aims to recreating the charm of minecraft beta 1.7.3**

Features includes:
- The removal of the hunger bar, xp bar and offhand
- Some mobs now have their old loot
- Some recipes are removed or changed to match beta
- Zombies now holds nore items, and has varying speeds
- Zombies, Skeletons, Strays, Husk and Drowned will now wear helmets and boots more
- Players now has pre 1.8 combat
- No end dimesion, villages, outpost,...
- Add a new structure called "churches" which bells can be obtained from
- Creepers has randomized fuse timers
- Food gives health instead of hunger
- Zombie Giants can spawn naturally (and has ai)
- Readded Better Void Fog
- Has Reduced Debug Info
- Compass and clocks now shows your coords and amount of days
